heading: Glan Devon vs Glanmire — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Glan Devon, Queensland and Glanmire, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Glan Devon and Glanmire have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Glan Devon or Glanmire safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Glan Devon has a flood risk score of 36/100, while Glanmire scores 40/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Glan Devon scores 26/100 for bushfire risk. Glanmire scores 24/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Glan Devon or Glanmire?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Glan Devon has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.53% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
